title: Local Campaigns | Keir Mather MP
text_excerpt: --> Local Campaigns | Keir Mather MP top of page Keir Mather MP Phone Mail Phone keir.mather.mp@parliament.uk ​​ 01757 247 990 ​ 16 Park Street, Selby, YO8 4PW Home About Selby and Kippax North Yorkshire Council Leeds City Council Seeking support Local Campaigns SEND provision Road safety Improving mobile signal Tackling flooding Better buses Progress in Parliament Key Policy Statements News Contact Privacy Policy Standards Local Campaigns My work is guided by what matters most to local people. I'm campaigning for better connectivity and safer streets, I'm securing investment in flood defences for our villages and pushing for more support in schools. ​ Scroll down for the latest updates on these campaigns, and if you have something that you want me to campaign on in the future, then please do get in touch with me. Email Me SEND provision Improving mobile signal Better buses Tackling flooding Road safety Stay updated on my work in the constituency and beyond Sign up for my newsletter © 2025 by Keir Mather MP.
